title: oldenlandia thymifolia
intro: Oldenlandia thymifolia, also known as thyme-leaved milkwort, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia thymifolia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia thymifolia include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
